{{Quote|I do not trust these strangers who dropped from the sky. I think the golden being is lying!|Granit|<ref name="Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X">''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Journey Across Planet X]]''</ref>}}
'''Granit''' was the leader of cave dwellers who was tall and muscular with a glistening black beard, who [[Stuart Zissu]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[4B-X]] encountered on [[Da'nor]]. He spoke [[N'or]] and carried a spear with him. Granit beat Zissu in [[space poker]] and won their [[azurite]] and their lives. He kept a [[Force pike/Legends|force pike]] in the corner of his house.

Granit was a Rebel operative waiting for Zissu, C-3PO, R2-D2 and 4B-X to arrive with orders to bring them to the secret Rebel base on [[Romm]]. Meanwhile he was leading the evacuation of Alliance supporters from [[Delantine]].
